snippet.description:
En el Canal de Suez, el paso comercial mar√≠timo que conecta el mar Rojo con el mar Mediterr√°neo, sigue encallado el portacontenedores 'Ever Given' por cuarto d√≠a consecutivo. La m√°xima autoridad del canal dio su primera rueda de prensa en la que asegur√≥ que una de las causas pudo haber sido un error humano y que no se sabe cu√°ndo se lograr√° desbloquear el canal.

snippet.description:

¬°Prep√°rate para mejorar tus cartas m√°s r√°pido con los objetos m√°gicos!
Permanece atento a m√°s detalles... ¬°TV Royale ma√Īana!  ūüĎÄ

¬°Bienvenidos a la Arena, Combatientes! De los creadores de Clash of Clans llega un juego de multijugadores presentando a la Familia Clash Royale, sus personajes favoritos del universo Clash y muchos, muchos m√°s.

Colecciona y mejora las decenas de tropas de Clash of Clans, hechizos y defensas que ya conoces y que tanto nos gustan, as√≠ como tambi√©n a los Royales: Pr√≠ncipes, Caballeros, Beb√©s dragones y m√°s. Destruye las torres del Rey enemigas y sus Princesas para vencer a tus oponentes y ganar todos los trofeos, coronas y gloria de la Arena. Crea un Clan para compartir cartas y construir tu propia comunidad llena de batallas √©picas.

¬°Dirige la Familia Clash Royale hacia la victoria!

CARACTER√ćSTICAS
¬∑ Lucha contra jugadores de todos los rincones del mundo a tiempo real; tanto en batallas 1c1 como en 2c2
¬∑ Obt√©n cofres para desbloquear recompensas, coleccionar cartas nuevas ponderosas y actualiza las que ya tengas
¬∑ Destruye las torres de tu oponente y gana Coronas para completar el incre√≠ble cofre de Coronas.
¬∑ Construye y mejora tu colecci√≥n de cartas con la Familia de Clash Royale junto con tus tropas favoritas de Clash of Clans, hechizos y defensas.
¬∑ Construye el mejor mazo b√©lico para derrotar a tus oponentes.
¬∑ Viaja a trav√©s de varias Arenas hasta llegar a las Ligas
¬∑ Crea tu Clan para compartir cartas y construir tu propia comunidad llena de batallas √©picas.
¬∑ Desaf√≠a a tus compa√Īeros de Clan y amigos a duelos amistosos, o juega con ellos en las batallas 2c2.
¬∑ Completa las misiones diarias y semanales para obtener incre√≠bles recompensas.
¬∑ Juega diferentes eventos todas las semanas.
¬∑ Aprende las diferentes t√©cnicas de batalla al mirar los mejores duelos en TV Royale.

¬°ATENCI√ďN! 
Clash Royale es absolutamente gratis para jugar y disfrutar, sin embargo, algunos objetos dentro del juego tambi√©n pueden ser comprados con dinero real. Si no deseas usar esta opci√≥n dentro del juego, por favor desactiva las compras dentro del juego en las opciones de compra dentro de tu dispositivo. Tambi√©n, bajo nuestros T√©rminos de Servicio y Pol√≠tica de Privacidad, debes tener por lo menos 13 a√Īos para jugar o descargar Clash Royale. Una conexi√≥n al internet es tambi√©n requerida para poder jugar.

Vis√≠tanos en https://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/?p=web o cont√°ctanos dentro del juego a trav√©s de las Opciones, Ayuda y soporte.

But no amount of freedom gets you clean

And your ‚Äėdon't you wish you had me‚Äô grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI crossed a line I‚Äôd never crossed in addiction.‚ÄĚ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

en.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
‚ÄúI knew that what I‚Äôd been looking for, I hadn‚Äôt found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.‚ÄĚ
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

Episode 3 available March 30 @ 12p PT

Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/alexzurdomusic
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexZurdoMusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexzurdomusic/
--------------
Letra:

[Redimi2]
Ah, ah√≠ estas t√ļ el que dec√≠as
Ser el enviado, el supuesto mes√≠as
El que iba a destruir el templo
Y a reconstruirlo en tres dias

Fantas√≠as y sensacionalismo
Tus seguidores llenos de fanatismo
Si en verdad eres quien dices ser
S√°lvanos y s√°lvate a ti mismo

Si resucitaste muertos con tu palabra
Si en verdad sanaste tanta gente
Como es posible que no puedas liberarte
Si aqu√≠ estamos consciente de que eres inocente

Aunque pens√°ndolo bien eres culpable
Tu poder se hizo dudable
Demu√©strame que me equivoco
O s√°lvanos que esta agon√≠a es insoportable

[Alex Zurdo]
Yo detendr√≠a todo esto porque puedo
Pero es necesario esta situaci√≥n
Y no has entendido que si aqu√≠ me quedo
Llegar√° la verdadera salvaci√≥n

Quieren que me libre de la muerte
Pa que siga con la vida
Pero yo dar√© la vida
Y ser√°n libres con mi muerte

Que si de verdad soy fuerte
Que me baje enseguida
Pero yo soy la verdad
Que enseguida te hace fuerte

Y aunque no entiendas y razones mal
Todo es parte de un plan inmenso
Que empez√≥ por la parte final
Y termin√≥ elaborando el comienzo

//Solo el amor, soporta el dolor
Perdona tu error y te da favor//

[Funky]
Hey, ser√° que no temes a Dios
Este hombre no merece estar aqu√≠ con nosotros dos
No, no seas indiferente
Que a √©l lo han condenado injustamente

√Čl no ten√≠a que atravesar este tormento
Sus verdugos sentir√°n el remordimiento
Presiento que este hombre es el hijo del Dios viviente
Creo que se est√° derramando sangre inocente

Jes√ļs yo no voy a reclamarte nada
Tu no me debes nada, yo no nada merezco
Ha sido un honor tenerte cerca aunque sea
En este momento en el que perezco

[Redimi2]
Ja, no me digas que le crees
√Čl no es lo que dijo ser
¬ŅNo lo ves? Solo es un rey de prostitutas y ladrones
Uno de m√°s de entre tantas religiones

[Funky]
Pues yo creo que es prop√≥sito divino
Que √©l est√© en esa cruz es parte de su destino
Se√Īor yo si te creo y creo que eres la vida
Que eres la verdad y que eres el camino

No me tienes que contestar
Solo una cosa te voy a rogar
No me vayas a olvidar
Y acu√©rdate de m√≠ cuando comiences a reinar

[Alex Zurdo]
Ni la vida, ni la muerte
Ni el presente o porvenir
Nada te separar√° de mi

Ni la vida, ni la muerte
Ni el lugar en donde estoy
//Nada impedir√° que est√©s en el para√≠so//

// (Te aseguro desde hoy
Ir√°s conmigo a donde voy) //

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äč‚Äč

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äč‚Äč
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äč‚Äč
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äč‚Äč
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

snippet.title: Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: ¬°PINTE A MIS HORMIGAS DE VARIOS COLORES!
snippet.description:
¬°Chicos hice un experimento con hormigas y a que no adivinan...tengo hormigas que cambian de color! Se trata de las hormigas fellah o camponotus fellah...he preparado sirop de colores: rosado y azul. Los coloqu√© en un vidrio y espera a que las hormigas fellah llegaran y bebieran el sirop de colores. Resultados inesperados completamente: las hormigas cambian de color! Al beber el sirop de colores sus barrigas cambian de color, es una de las reacciones quimicas mas interesantes que he visto en mi vida, y por su puesto se los mostrar√© en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limite. Adoro los experimentos caseros como este llenos de curiosidades, para mas videos divertidos y experimentos divertidos...date un paseo por mi canal! No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

¬°Suscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

‚Ėļ Para propuestas comerciales: timon@mediacube.in 

Este canal es la VERSI√ďN OFICIAL del canal TimOn ChaveS para la audiencia hispanohablante.

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

En alg√ļn episodio anterior, les compart√≠ mi an√©cdota sobre una agradable se√Īora que se ofreci√≥ a hacerme un masaje en las calles de Caracas... Al terminar, intent√© pagarle al rededor de 5 d√≥lares y ella, de una manera muy honrada y humilde, me dijo que solo le diera un d√≥lar y al final eso fue lo que le pagu√©.

Esto provoc√≥ algunas opiniones encontradas en los comentarios del video, algunos resaltaban el buen gesto y honestidad de la se√Īora, pero tambi√©n algunos me tacharon que taca√Īo y ego√≠sta por no haber insistido en darle m√°s dinero... Y aunque puedo asegurarles que en ese momento yo s√≠ quer√≠a darle m√°s que solo un d√≥lar... En este video les platicar√© sobre la absurda y complicada econom√≠a que vive Venezuela en la actualidad incluso para los turistas y el motivo por el cual en ESE momento, tuve que aceptar su oferta de pagarle solo un d√≥lar por ese masaje.

Pero antes de llegar a eso, me gustar√≠a terminar de explicarte los √ļltimos a√Īos de la vida de Hugo Ch√°vez y una breve explicaci√≥n sobre el gobierno del actual presidente Nicol√°s Maduro, para que puedas comprender por qu√© utilizar el dinero en Venezuela ahora es tan complicado.

en.description:
The sixth season of ‚ÄėGot Talent Spain‚Äô will surprise you with hundreds of exciting and fun performances that will be judged by a fun and demanding jury. Risto Mejide, the singer Edurne and the humorist Dani Mart√≠nez repeat on the program to assess all the numbers and decide who should or shouldn‚Äôt go to the next stage of the selection of the Telecinco talent show, which returns stronger than ever. 

There are many participants who will fight to fulfill their dream on the stage of the show after a confinement that has changed everything and which it as shown that there is still a lot of talent to discover. Many of those stories are important in these performances that it is impossible not to get excited about. 

Singer with songs that you will love, spectacular group dance numbers that will impress you, surprising magic tricks that are impossible to discover, comedians with whom you will not stop laughing, children with unimaginable talents or athletes who turn their discipline into a talent. They are part of this edition of the talent show and everyone will fight to win the Golden Pass of the jury and Santi Mill√°n. But getting it will not be easy. 

Get ready to get excited, to laugh like never before and to vibrate with these numbers. Get ready to accompany our participant on what will be the most special trip of their lives. You join?

T√ļ debes ser ingeniera, porque qu√© bien te qued√≥ el puente entre tu boca y la m√≠a
Si hubiera sido por m√≠ ni me atrever√≠a a haberte dado ese beso que me ha cambiado la vida
T√ļ debes ser cirujana porque en el pecho me curaste lo que a m√≠ me dol√≠a

¬ŅPor qu√© yo si tienes tantas opciones?

¬ŅPor qu√© yo si en este mundo hay millones?
¬ŅPor qu√© yo si tienes tantas opciones?
¬ŅDime por qu√© conmigo?
Si yo no te merezco
Porque al hombre perfecto yo ni un poquito me le parezco
 
¬ŅDime por qu√© yo yo yo yo yo?
Si hay millo-llo-llo-llones millones
¬ŅAy dime por qu√© yo yo yo yo?
Si hay millones, millones
 
Por ti me veo las series que no me gustan
Te pido en Uber Eats lo que te gusta
Y dejo que t√ļ elijas la temperatura
Aunque se me congelen el pelo y las u√Īas
 
Yo por ti todo lo apuesto
T√ļ brillas diferente al resto
Para siempre t√ļ tendr√°s el primer puesto
 
T√ļ conoces todos mis defectos
Estabas cuando no hubo presupuesto
Contigo yo me fui a la cima
T√ļ me subes la autoestima
 
Y hasta de mis chistes malos t√ļ te r√≠es (jajajaja)
T√ļ eres mi porrista mi cheerleader
 
¬ŅPor qu√© yo si en este mundo hay millones?
¬ŅPor qu√© yo si tienes tantas opciones?
¬ŅDime por qu√© conmigo?
Si no tiene sentido
Me gusta que cuando hablas de tu futuro estoy incluido

¬ŅPor qu√© yo si tienes tantas opciones? (M√°s guapos)
¬ŅDime por qu√© conmigo? (Con m√°s plata)

Porque al hombre perfecto yo ni un poquito me le parezco
 
¬ŅDime por qu√© yo yo yo yo yo?

¬ŅHay dime por qu√© yo yo yo yo?

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.
